source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder setup contains 1 kg of ammonia at 20\circ\text{C} with a volume of 0.1 m^3. Initially the piston rests on some stops with the top surface open to the atmosphere, $P_0$, so that a pressure of 1400 kPa is required to lift it. If it is heated to saturated vapor, find the final heat transfer.

Initially the piston rests on some stops with the top surface open to the atmosphere, $P_0$, so that a pressure of 1400 kPa is required to lift it. If it is heated to saturated vapor, find the final heat transfer.
